title: Bring Back My Ghouls
overview: Welcome to an unSPOOKable evening of tricks, treats, and tucks! Celebrate the spirit of Halloween by tipping your favorite Queens of RuPaul’s Drag Race season 12. All donations will be divided up evenly and distributed directly to the Queens. We will be taking donations through Venmo, PayPal, and Cash App. Now…bring back my Ghouls!
